ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided WebGL context does not have a stencil buffer, masks may not render correctly
ast.target: 提供的 WebGL 上下文没有模板缓冲区，遮罩可能无法正确渲染

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided WebGL context does not support 32 index buffer, complex graphics may not render correctly
ast.target: 提供的 WebGL 上下文不支持 32 位索引缓冲区，复杂图形可能无法正确渲染

ast.name: warn
ast.source: unsupported index buffer type: uint32
ast.target: 不支持的索引缓冲区类型：uint32

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TransformFeedback is not supported but TransformFeedbackVaryings are given.
ast.target: 不支持 TransformFeedback，但提供了 TransformFeedbackVaryings。

ast.name: warn

ast.target: EventBoundary 无法将非指针事件映射为指针事件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: EventBoundary cannot map a non-wheel event as a wheel event
ast.target: EventBoundary 无法将非滚轮事件映射为滚轮事件
